name: Log
description: Logs are wood blocks used as a primary source for crafting planks and other wooden materials.

name: Plank
description: Planks are common blocks used as building blocks and in crafting recipes.

name: Stone
description: Stone is a common solid block used for building and crafting.

name: Cobblestone
description: Cobblestone is a basic block obtained when mining stone without Silk Touch.

name: Ore
description: Ores are blocks that contain valuable resources which can be smelted or mined for materials.

name: Iron Ingot
description: A refined form of iron used for crafting tools, weapons, armor, and utility blocks.
obtained_by: Smelting iron ore in a furnace

name: Copper Ingot
description: A refined metal used for crafting and building blocks.
obtained_by: Smelting copper ore in a furnace

name: Andesite
description: Andesite is a decorative stone-type block found naturally underground.

name: Diorite
description: Diorite is a decorative stone-type block found naturally underground.

name: Gravel
description: Gravel is a loose block that can fall due to gravity and may drop flint when mined.

name: Stick
description: A basic crafting material used for tools and weapons.

name: Crafting Table
description: Used to craft most items in the game.

name: Chest
description: Used to store items.

name: Coal
description: Coal is a common fuel used for smelting and crafting torches.
obtained_by: Mining coal ore or smelting logs to make charcoal

name: Furnace
description: A Furnace is used to smelt ores and cook food.

name: Smoker
description: A utility block used to cook food faster than a furnace.

name: Coal
description: A common fuel used for smelting and crafting torches.
obtained_by: Mining coal ore or from chests and mobs

name: Blast Furnace
description: A utility block used to smelt ores and metal tools/armor faster than a regular furnace.

name: Campfire
description: A block used for cooking food, producing light, and creating smoke signals.

name: Torch
description: A light-emitting block used to illuminate areas and prevent mob spawning.

name: Ladder
description: Used to climb vertically between blocks.

name: Door
description: A door is used as an entryway that can be opened and closed.

name: Trapdoor
description: A trapdoor is a thin door-like block placed on floors or ceilings.

name: Iron Trapdoor
description: A iron trapdoor is a thin door-like block placed on floors or ceilings which can be activated using a button or lever.

name: Boat
description: A boat is used to travel across water quickly.

name: Sign
description: A sign is used to display text messages.

name: Fence
description: A fence is used as a barrier to keep mobs and players enclosed.

name: Stair
description: Stairs are blocks that allow players to move up and down more easily.

name: Slab
description: Slabs are half-height blocks used for decoration and efficient building.

name: Pressure Plate
description: Pressure plate activates redstone when stepped on.

name: Helmet
description: Helmet protects the player's head and reduces damage.

name: Chestplate
description: Chestplate protects the player's torso and provides strong defense.

name: Leggings
description: Leggings protect the player's legs and reduce damage.

name: Boots
description: Boots protect the player's feet and reduce fall and combat damage.

name: Sword
description: Sword is a melee weapon used to deal damage to mobs and players.

name: Pickaxe
description: Pickaxe is used to mine stone, ores, and other hard blocks.

name: Axe
description: Axe is used to chop wood and wooden blocks faster.

name: Shovel
description: Shovel is used to dig dirt, sand, and gravel faster.

name: Hoe
description: How is used to till soil for farming.

name: Spear
description: Spear is a pointed weapon used for melee or throwing attacks.
